name: Kim Jong-il
title: Last known photo of Kim Jong-il, taken in late 2011, shortly before his death from a heart attack aboard his private train.
description: Kim Jong-il, the supreme leader of North Korea, was photographed in late 2011 during the final months of his rule. Kim had suffered a stroke in 2008 and his health had visibly deteriorated. On December 17, 2011, he died of a heart attack while aboard his armored private train near Pyongyang, reportedly while traveling to an area outside the capital for a field guidance tour. His death was not announced until December 19, when state television broadcast the news with his son Kim Jong-un named as his successor. He was 69 years old.
bio: Kim Jong-il was the supreme leader of North Korea from 1994 to 2011. He maintained one of the world's most isolated and authoritarian regimes during his rule.
